search.title: Quick search
search.hint: Type a keyword to find orders, products or customers.

auth.title: BigBike Admin
auth.subtitle: Enter your admin email and password to access the dashboard.

auth.connectionOfflineTooltip: Using sample data — not connected to a live server

app.routeNotFoundDesc: This admin path does not exist.
app.moduleNotAvailableDesc: This module is not available in the current version.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor your business activity in real time.
dashboard.greetingDesc: Today is {{date}}. Here's how the business is doing.
dashboard.mockWarning: Showing mock data. Backend connection failed or not configured.

attention.title: Needs your attention
attention.emptyDesc: Orders, receivables and inventory are all in good shape.

revenueChart.title: Daily Revenue
revenueChart.subtitle: Unit: million ₫
revenueChart.emptyDesc: The revenue chart will appear here once orders are placed.

recentOrders.title: Recent Orders
recentOrders.emptyDesc: New orders will appear here as soon as customers place them.

topProducts.title: Top Products
topProducts.emptyDesc: Rankings update once orders are completed within the period.

readOnly.defaultDesc: Mutation APIs are not implemented in this phase.

products.title: Products
products.description: Manage product catalog records with real create/update mutation APIs.
products.emptyDesc: Try changing the filter conditions or create a new product.
products.emptyTrashDesc: Try clearing filters or switch back to another publish status.
products.deleteConfirm:
Move product "{{name}}" to trash?
Publish status will change to TRASH and the product will be hidden from the website.
products.dupLoadError: Could not load product data to copy.
products.duplicateTitle: Duplicate this product into a new one
products.homepageWarnDetail: The homepage shows at most {{limit}} products in the "{{block}}" block. The surplus is silently dropped — sort by the "Homepage order" column to pick the {{limit}} products to show.

detail.createDesc: Create a new product record in catalog.
detail.editDesc: Update product fields and publish status.
detail.notFoundDesc: The selected product does not exist.
detail.loadingDesc: Fetching product detail for edit mode.
detail.permissionDesc: You can view this product, but products.update is required to save changes.
detail.installationHint: Describe installation steps, usage notes, or a compatibility table. Shown in the "Installation guide" section on the product page.
detail.installationPlaceholder: Enter installation steps, usage notes, compatibility table...
detail.relatedHint: Search and add products to display in the "Related products" block at the bottom of the detail page. Leave empty to hide the block entirely.
detail.name: Name *
detail.skuHint: Optional identifier for the product family. When a product has variants, the selling SKU lives on each variant below.
detail.specialStockNote: Special state: {{state}} — handle via dedicated API
detail.specialPublishNote: Special state: {{state}} — restore via dedicated API
detail.errSlugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
detail.errRetailPriceRequired: Retail price is required when creating.
detail.errRetailPriceInt: Retail price must be an integer.
detail.errCompareAtPriceInt: Compare-at price must be an integer.
detail.errSalePriceInt: Sale price must be an integer.
detail.errSalePriceHigh: Sale price must be lower than retail/compare-at price.
detail.errImageUrl: Image URL is invalid. Use a path from the media library or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errShortDescriptionTooShort: Short description must be at least 20 characters to display meaningfully.
detail.errContentBottomTooLong: Content bottom must not exceed 50,000 characters.
detail.errSeoTitleTooLong: SEO title must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.errSeoDescriptionTooLong: SEO description must not exceed 5,000 characters.
detail.errSeoCanonicalUrl: SEO canonical URL must start with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoOgImageUrl: SEO OG image URL is invalid. Use a media path or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoOgImageAltTooLong: SEO OG image alt must not exceed 255 characters.

checklist.title: Pre-publish checklist
checklist.name: Product name
checklist.blockerMessage: {{count}} required item(s) are still missing. Please complete them first.
checklist.warningMessage: {{count}} optional item(s) are incomplete. You can still publish.

assign.title: Assignment
assign.itemsContent: Basic info · Main image · Image gallery · Video · Specifications · Installation guide · FAQ · Variants · Related products · SEO bottom content
assign.itemsSeo: SEO meta (Title, Meta, OG image) · URL slug · Review checklist before publishing

gallery.multiSelectTitle: Pick multiple images from the library

specs.empty: No specifications yet. Click "+ Add spec" to start.

faqs.empty: No questions yet. Click "+ Add question" to start.
faqs.hint: FAQs appear as an accordion on the product page and enrich search-engine data.

blocks.fallbackHint: Add blocks above to replace this content.
blocks.empty: No blocks yet. Click "Add block" to start.

variant.name: Variant name *
variant.colorImageHintWithColor: This image is shared across all sizes/variants with the same color. Switching size within this color keeps the same primary image.
variant.colorImageHintNoColor: Add a Color attribute to configure a color-scoped primary image.
variant.colorGalleryHintWithColor: This gallery is shared across all sizes/variants with the same color. Switching size within this color keeps the same gallery.
variant.colorGalleryHintNoColor: Add a Color attribute to configure a color-scoped gallery. If empty, storefront falls back to the product gallery.
variant.removeConfirm: Remove variant "{{label}}"? This action cannot be undone.
variant.filterPlaceholder: Filter by name / SKU / attribute ({{count}} variants)
variant.changeColorConfirm: This variant currently has its own image and gallery. Changing color will remove them. Continue?

matrix.title: Quick variant generator
matrix.description: Enter attributes and values (comma-separated). The system will generate all combinations automatically.
matrix.valuesHelp: Enter values separated by commas. Example: Red, Blue, White
matrix.rowValuesEmpty: Enter at least 1 value for this attribute
matrix.estimateWarn: Will generate {{count}} variant(s) — this is quite many, please review.
matrix.estimateHardCap: {{count}} variants exceeds the maximum of {{cap}}. Reduce the number of values to continue.

draftRecovery.found: An unsaved draft from {{time}} was found.

detail.duplicateSuccess: Copied from "{{name}}". Please provide a new name and slug.
detail.slugHint: Lowercase letters a-z, digits 0-9, and hyphens only. Auto-generated from product name.
detail.slugSharedHint: The URL slug is shared across both languages — editable only on the Vietnamese tab.
detail.langEnHint: The English version is optional — leave it blank and the Vietnamese version is shown instead.
detail.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: AGV K1S full-face helmet with ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight composite shell, scratch-resistant visor, ideal for touring…
detail.shortDescriptionHint: Shown below the title on the product page and in product listings. Minimum 20 characters, ideal 80–160 characters.
detail.homepageHint: A product can belong to only one homepage block. If the block exceeds its limit, overflow items are hidden — use "Homepage order" to prioritize what appears first.
detail.homepagePublishWarning: This product is not Published yet — it will only appear on the website after switching status to Published.
detail.homepageOrderHint: Leave empty if pinning is not needed — products are then sorted by newest first. Smaller numbers appear first.
detail.variantPricingHint: This product has variants — pricing below applies to all variants. Cart and checkout always use this price.
detail.compareAtPriceTitle: The compare-at price is shown as strikethrough when sale price exists
detail.discountFromBaseHint: Calculated from retail price (or compare-at if retail is empty).
detail.discountNeedsBaseHint: Please enter Retail price or Compare-at price first.
detail.saleMustBeLower: Sale price must be lower than retail price.
detail.forceOutOfStockHint: The product will appear as "Out of stock" and cannot be purchased on the website, regardless of inventory above.
detail.gallerySectionDescription: Shared images across all colors: certificates, liner, size chart, packaging, etc. Used before variant selection or when a color has no dedicated gallery.
detail.videoSectionDescription: YouTube links or uploaded product videos
detail.specsSectionDescription: Displayed under the "Technical specifications" tab on the product page
detail.saveHiddenTitle: Save changes while keeping product hidden
detail.publishTitle: Save and publish product to website
detail.unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this page will discard them. Continue?

orders.title: Orders
orders.emptyDesc: No orders match the current filter conditions.

detail.name: Name:
detail.confirmBacsMessage:
Confirm the bank transfer was received?

This will automatically mark the order as PAID. Only confirm after you have checked the bank statement.
detail.confirmStatusMessage:
Are you sure you want to move this order to "{{label}}"?

This action cannot be undone.
detail.autoMarkedPaidToast: Order confirmed. Payment was automatically marked as received.
detail.confirmPayPaidMessage:
Confirm full payment received for this order?

The order will be marked as PAID. Only confirm after you have reconciled the actual cash flow.
detail.confirmPayCancelledMessage:
Cancel the payment for this order?

This marks the payment as CANCELLED.
detail.trackingHint: Tracking number is required to move to the Shipping status.
detail.trackingRequiredError: Please enter the tracking number before moving to the Shipping status.
detail.confirmFulfillmentMessage:
Are you sure you want to move fulfillment to "{{label}}"?
This action cannot be undone.
detail.returnsLoadError: Could not load this order's return list. Please reload the page.
detail.transitionsLoadError: Could not load the list of available actions.
detail.crmNoItemError: Select at least 1 item to return.
detail.confirmCancelDesc: This will cancel the order and notify the customer. This action cannot be undone.
detail.confirmFailedDesc: This will mark the order as failed. Stock will be released and the order cannot be reactivated. This action is irreversible.
detail.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for this action...
detail.reasonRequired: A reason is required for this action.

categories.title: Product categories
categories.description: Group products into categories so customers can browse them easily on the website.
categories.emptyDesc: Clear filters or add your first category.
categories.openDetail: Open to view details and edit
categories.dragHandleTitle: Drag and drop to change position (only within the same parent)
categories.reorderSameParentOnly: You can only drag-reorder within the same parent category. To move under a different parent, open the detail screen and pick a new "Parent category".
categories.emptySearchDesc: No category matches "{{value}}". Try a different keyword or clear the search box.
categories.slugInvalidParent: You cannot pick one of this category's own children as its parent.
categories.sectionBasicDesc: The category's name, image, description and position on the website.
categories.sectionSeoDesc: Fine-tune the title, description and image shown when this category is searched for or shared. Optional — by default the system uses the category's own name and description.
categories.descriptionPlaceholder: Short introduction to this product group, shown at the top of the category page.
categories.descriptionHint: You can use bold, underline, images and links.
categories.selectAllAria: Select all categories on this page

detail.createDesc: Create a new product group to display on the website.
detail.editDesc: Update the category's name, image, description and display status.
detail.notFoundDesc: The category you are viewing no longer exists — it may have been deleted.
detail.permissionDesc: Your account can only view this page. Contact your administrator to request permission to edit product categories.
detail.slugHint: This is the tail of the address on the website, e.g. bigbike.vn/product-category/helmets. Use only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
detail.name: Category name *
detail.parentIdHint: Leave empty if this is a top-level category. Note: you cannot pick a sub-category of this one (it would create a loop).
detail.sortOrderHint: Smaller numbers appear first. Leave blank if you don't need to set a priority.
detail.seoOgImageUrl: Image shown when shared on social media
detail.seoOgImageAlt: Description of the share image (for screen readers)
detail.seoNoIndex: Hide this page from Google search results
detail.viewOnSiteTitle: Open the public category page in a new tab
detail.discardConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leaving the page will lose them. Are you sure?
detail.productCountTitle: Number of products currently in this category
detail.productsSectionDesc: Products currently placed in this category, most recently updated first.
detail.productsEmpty: No products are placed in this category yet.
detail.seoPreviewFallbackDesc: Once you fill in "Description shown on Google" below, that text will appear here — exactly as customers see it in search results.
detail.errSlugRequired: Please enter a website URL path.
detail.errSlugFormat: The URL path may only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (e.g. fullface-helmets).
detail.errSortOrder: Display order must be a non-negative whole number.
detail.errImageUrl: Category image is invalid. Pick an image from the Media library or paste a full address starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errIconUrl: Icon is invalid. Pick an image from the Media library or paste a full address starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errSlugTooLong: URL path must not exceed 100 characters.
detail.errNameTooLong: Category name must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.errDescriptionTooLong: Short description must not exceed 5,000 characters.
detail.errImageAltTooLong: Image description must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.errIconAltTooLong: Icon description must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.errSeoTitleTooLong: Google title must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.errSeoDescriptionTooLong: Google description must not exceed 5,000 characters.
detail.errSeoCanonicalUrl: Canonical address must start with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoOgImageUrl: Share image is invalid. Pick an image from the Media library or paste a full address starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoOgImageAltTooLong: Share image description must not exceed 255 characters.
detail.menuNoticeTitle: Note: the website menu does not auto-update
detail.menuNoticeDesc: If this category appears in the website's main menu (header, footer, mega-menu), changes to the name or URL won't sync automatically. Open the "Menus" section to update it after saving.
detail.dangerZoneDesc: The actions below cannot be undone. Read carefully before proceeding.
detail.hardDeleteConfirm:
You are about to permanently delete the category "{{name}}".

This action CANNOT be undone. Once deleted, the category will disappear from both admin and the website.

If you only want to temporarily hide it from the website, use the "Hide" button instead.
detail.hardDeleteConfirmWithChildren:
You are about to permanently delete the category "{{name}}".

⚠️ This category contains {{count}} sub-categories — all of them will be deleted too.

This action CANNOT be undone. If you only want to temporarily hide it, use the "Hide" button instead.
detail.hardDeleteConflict: This category cannot be deleted yet because it still contains sub-categories or products. Please move or delete those first, then try again.

brands.emptyDesc: Clear filters or create a new brand.

detail.notFoundDesc: The selected brand does not exist.
detail.hideConfirm: Hide this brand? The /brands/{slug} page will return 404. Products that reference this brand will keep the link — reassign them first if needed. To restore, edit the brand and re-enable "Visible".

detail.permissionDesc: You can view this brand, but catalog.update is required to save changes.
detail.errSlugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
detail.errLogoUrl: Logo URL is invalid. Use a path from the media library or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoCanonicalUrl: Canonical URL must start with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoOgImageUrl: SEO OG image URL is invalid. Use a path from the media library or a URL starting with http:// or https://.

detail.permissionDesc: You can only view. Need content.update permission to save.

detail.relatedProductsHint: Search and add products to display in the "Products used in this article" block on the detail page.
detail.errSlugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens.
detail.errCoverImageUrl: Cover image URL is invalid. Use a path from the media library or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errProductImageUrl: Product overlay image URL is invalid. Use a path from the media library or a URL starting with http:// or https://.
detail.errSeoCanonicalUrl: Canonical URL must start with http:// or https://.

customers.title: Customers
customers.emptyDesc: No customers match the current conditions.

media.title: Media Library
media.deleteConfirm: Delete this file? This action cannot be undone.
media.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type: {{type}}. Accepted: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG, MP4, MP3, OGG, WAV, AAC.
media.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} selected files? They go to trash and can be restored later.
media.hardDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? File will be removed from storage. This CANNOT be undone.
media.bulkHardDeleteConfirm: Permanently delete {{count}} selected files? Files removed from storage. This CANNOT be undone. Files in use will be skipped.
media.bulkHardDeleteSummary: Permanently deleted {{deleted}}, blocked {{blocked}} (in use), skipped {{missing}} (not found).
media.folderDeleteConfirm: Delete folder "{{name}}"? Files in it will move to Uncategorized.
media.replaceHint: Replacement keeps the same URL — links from products/articles still work.
media.usageNoneDesc: This file is not used anywhere. It can be permanently deleted.

picker.title: Image library
picker.uploadTitle: Drag and drop images here or click to choose files
picker.empty: No images found. Drop images here to upload.
picker.emptySearch: No matching images found. Drop images here to upload.

menus.title: Menus
menus.description: Manage the three system menu slots rendered by the storefront: header, footer, and buying guide.
menus.slotPrimaryDesc: Primary navigation rendered in the site header.
menus.slotGuideDesc: Buying guide / sizing links rendered in the footer.
menus.slotMissingTitle: System menu "{{location}}" is missing from the database
menus.slotMissingDesc: This slot may have been deleted manually. Restart the backend so Flyway re-seeds it, or contact the engineering team.
menus.dragSameParent: Drag sorting only works within the same parent. Use Parent item to change levels.
menus.statusInactiveHint: This item will not appear on the website even if its parent is visible.

sliders.title: Banners
sliders.formRequired: Either external link or product ID is required.
sliders.formExternalLinkHint: Only internal paths starting with / or safe https:// URLs are allowed.
sliders.formExternalLinkInvalid: Invalid external link. Only /... paths or https:// URLs are allowed.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: Manage shipping zones and delivery methods.
shipping.noZone: Select a zone to view methods
shipping.formFreeThresholdHint: Leave blank or 0 to disable free shipping
shipping.invalidMethodCode: Method code must contain only lowercase letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

settings.title: Website Settings
settings.noSettingsDesc: Settings are empty or have not been imported.
settings.confirmSaveMessage:
Save changes for this settings group?

Some values (tax rate, minimum order, stock thresholds) directly affect prices and operations shown on the website.
settings.valEmail: Enter a valid email, e.g. name@bigbike.vn
settings.valUrl: Enter a full web URL, e.g. https://bigbike.vn/promo
settings.valPhone: Phone number may only contain digits, + or -
settings.valRate: Tax rate must be a number between 0 and 1 (e.g. 0.10 = 10%).
settings.valNumber: Value must be a non-negative number.

adminUsers.title: Admin Users
adminUsers.emptyDesc: There are no admin user accounts in the system.
adminUsers.emptySearchDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters.
adminUsers.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable this account?
adminUsers.confirmRoleChange: Are you sure you want to change this user's role?
adminUsers.selfEditLocked: This is your own account — you cannot change your own role or disable your account. You can still change the display name and password.

auditLog.title: Activity Log
auditLog.description: Track important actions in admin: orders, products, inventory, settings, and users.
auditLog.emptyDesc: No actions have been recorded yet.
auditLog.emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your search keyword, section filter, actor filter, or date range.
auditLog.filterSearchPlaceholder: Search order code, product, customer, actor…
auditLog.drawerDangerBanner: This is a high-impact action — review carefully.
auditLog.drawerNoChanges: No before/after data available to compare.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: View and adjust stock quantities per product variant.

stockIn.title: Stock In
stockIn.serialsBulkPlaceholder:
One serial per line — paste from Excel, text file or barcode scanner
E.g.:
SN-001
SN-002
SN-003
stockIn.serialsBatchPanelLabel: Paste serial list — one serial per line (from Excel, text file or barcode scanner)
stockIn.serialsImportFileLabel: Select Excel or CSV file containing serial numbers
stockIn.errorVariantRequired: Please select a variant to stock in.
stockIn.errorFileUnsupported: Unsupported file format. Please use .xlsx, .xls, .csv or .txt.
stockIn.errorFileParseFailed: Could not read file. Please check the format.
stockIn.errorQtyRequired: Quantity must be a positive integer (min 1).
stockIn.errorGeneric: Failed to stock in. Please try again.

returns.title: Returns Management (RMA)
returns.description: Process return and refund requests from customers.
returns.searchLabel: Search by RMA or order number
returns.emptyDesc: No return requests match the criteria.
returns.modalQcWarning: Some items have no QC result. Mark all items as Pass / Fail before moving to Completed or Refunded.
returns.errorRefundRequired: Enter a refund amount greater than 0 before confirming the refund.
returns.errorRefundMustMatch: Refund amount must equal {{amount}} (the remaining refundable amount). Partial refunds are not supported.
returns.confirmRefund:
Confirm refund of {{amount}} for return request {{rma}}?

This action records the refund for the customer.
returns.confirmReject:
Reject return request {{rma}}?

The customer will see the request as rejected.
returns.refundPartialBlocked: This return does not cover the entire order — refunds cannot be processed here. Close the return (Completed), then use the Refund button on the order details page.
returns.refundFullHint: Only full refunds are supported. The refund amount has been auto-filled with the remaining refundable amount.

warranty.title: Warranty Management
warranty.description: List of warranty records by order. Void a warranty if needed.
warranty.emptyDesc: No warranties match the current filters.
warranty.modalVoidConfirmText: Confirm voiding this warranty? This action cannot be undone.

serial.title: Serial Management
serial.description: Search and track all serials across all products.
serial.emptyDesc: Try changing the filters or search term.
serial.modalConfirmTerminal: Status {{status}} cannot be undone. Press Confirm again to proceed.
serial.errorNoteRequired: A reason is required when moving to this status.
serial.warrantyForbidden: You do not have permission to view warranty information.

receivables.title: Receivables
receivables.description: Manage credit sales and receivables collection
receivables.emptyDesc: Try changing the filters or create a credit sale from POS.

btn.writeOffTooltip: Mark this receivable as uncollectable. This action cannot be undone.

recordPayment.title: Collect payment
recordPayment.subtitle: Order {{orderNumber}}
recordPayment.refHelper: e.g. bank transfer reference, receipt number

writeOff.title: Write off
writeOff.subtitle: Order {{orderNumber}}
writeOff.irreversible: This action cannot be undone. The reason will be recorded in history.
writeOff.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Customer bankrupt, unable to contact...

detail.closedNotice: This receivable is closed — no further actions available.

reports.title: Revenue Reports
reports.description: Revenue, products and customers by time period.

roles.title: Permissions
roles.description: Manage staff roles and permissions. All changes are recorded in the audit log.
roles.emptyDesc: No roles have been configured yet.
roles.selectRole: Select a role on the left to view its permissions.
roles.saveError: Failed to save permissions. Please try again.
roles.discardChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard and switch roles?
roles.superAdminBanner: The Owner role has full access — all permissions are granted automatically and cannot be changed through the UI.
roles.noEditPermission: View only. You need roles.write permission to edit role permissions.
roles.noEditSystem: The Owner role cannot be edited.
roles.sensitivePermAdd:
You are about to GRANT "{{perm}}" to role {{role}}.

This is a security-sensitive permission. After saving, all staff in this role will GAIN this capability.

Are you sure?
roles.sensitivePermRemove:
You are about to REVOKE "{{perm}}" from role {{role}}.

After saving, all staff in this role will LOSE this capability.

Are you sure?
roles.otherPermsNote: These permissions are not yet declared in the UI. A developer should add display labels for them.
roles.saveSensitiveWarning: These changes include sensitive permissions — they affect system security. Review carefully before confirming.
roles.saveOwnRoleWarning: You are editing your own role. Removing permissions here directly affects your own access.
roles.selfLockoutBlocked: Cannot remove role-management permissions from your own role — it would lock you out.
roles.createRoleIdHint: Uppercase letters, numbers and underscores only. Cannot be changed after creation.
roles.createRoleError: Failed to create role. Please try again.
roles.deleteRoleConfirm:
You are about to delete role "{{name}}". This cannot be undone.

Staff currently assigned this role may lose access after deletion.

Are you sure you want to continue?
roles.deleteRoleError: Failed to delete role. Please try again.
roles.permPosPriceOverride: Override price at point of sale

pos.searchHint: Enter a name or SKU to search products
pos.noResultsDesc: No products match the search term.
pos.refundUnavailableCredit: Unpaid credit orders cannot be refunded. Use the write-off flow instead.
pos.refundSerialWarning: Order contains serial-tracked items — refund will not automatically return serials to stock. Physical returns must go through the Returns flow.

newsletterSubscribers.description: Emails collected via the newsletter signup widget in the website footer.
newsletterSubscribers.emptyDesc: Emails from newsletter signups will appear here.

attributes.title: Color Swatches
attributes.description: Manage swatch images and hex color codes for product color attributes.
attributes.noColorAttrsDesc: Attributes with kind="color" will appear here for swatch management.
